{{Quote|I want a transfer to the Navy!|Mandus Fouc|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Mandus Fouc''' was an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] officer and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the customs ship ''[[Impounder]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A tall, handsome man, Fouc's skills and prowess had impressed high-ranking [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] officers. He was due to be transferred to a command post in the Navy shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. However, the chaos following the death of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] resulted in Fouc's transfer not being processed, forcing him to remain a Customs officer.

Some years after Endor, he took a prominent role in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] bid to take control of the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]]. The bid failed after being repulsed by the Kalindan military and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] secretly hired by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
